title: jijAcraft Silver Tinsel Fringe Garland: 2M Glitter Metallic Foil Fringe Garland, 20cm Shiny Tinsel Party Decoration for Car Parade Floats Birthday Weddings Christmas
features: 【Silver Metallic Tinsel Garland】This metallic tinsel garland for birthday features a classic silver tone. Whether hung on the porch or suspended from the ceiling, this timeless silver hue immerses every significant moment—birthday parties, anniversaries, Christmas and more—in a ritualistic ambiance embraced by radiance.

【Glitter Foil Fringe Garland】Our silver tinsel garland backdrop reflects light beautifully. Whether under the warm glow of party venues, the spotlight on stage, or natural daylight, shiny foil tassel garland will instantly become the eye-catching centerpiece at birthday parties, weddings, hen parties, dances and other occasions, easily enhancing the festive atmosphere.

【2M Metallic Foil Fringe Garland】You will receive a 2m glitter fringe garland with 20cm-long tassels, which can be easily cut to any size or layered with two tinsel garlands together.Metallic tinsel garland is perfect for DIY costume making, adding sparkling fringe details to dresses, skirts, dance outfits, or cosplay accessories.

【Material】Our sparkly metallic tinsel garland are made of polyester and PET. The metallic foil surface gives the tassels a reflective effect, making them look more shiny under the light. The silver foil fringe garlands are perfect for car decorations, parade floats, trailer decorations, wedding car decorations, ship decorations, etc.

【Foil Fringe Garland for Decoration】This sparkly tinsel garland is perfect for decorating any occasion: weddings, hen parties, birthday parties, dances, graduation ceremonies, Frozen-themed parties, Christmas, New Year's Eve, anniversaries, and can even serve as a photo backdrop. You can also use glitter fringe garland to decorate classrooms, stage, ceilings, doors, windows, railings, tables, fireplaces, etc.
